scripts.dev:dummy-data: RENTMATE_DB_URI=postgresql+psycopg2://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/rentmate poetry run python scripts/seed_dummy_data.py && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.start: npm run build && poetry run uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.lint: poetry run ruff check . && poetry run python scripts/lint_kwargs.py
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf data/db && mkdir -p data/db data/documents && echo 'Postgres data directory reset — restart dev to recreate the database'
scripts.test: npm run test:migrations && poetry run pytest && npm run test:ui
scripts.evals:parallel: poetry run pytest evals/ -m eval -v -n auto
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:install && npm run test:evals
